mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_task_execution_log SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE start_time < #{threshold} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE status = 'FAILURE' AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(duration), 0) FROM sys_task_execution_log WHERE duration IS NOT NULL AND deleted = FALSE
